import React from 'react' function PlacesToVisit(trip) { return (

Places To Visit

trip?.hotel_options?.length > 0 ? ( trip?.hotel_options?.map((hotel, index) => (

{hotel?.hotel_name}

📍{hotel?.hotel_address}

🏷️{hotel?.price_range}

⭐{hotel?.rating}

) } export default PlacesToVisit
